LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. THIS MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW A LIKELIHOOD OF SUCCESS ON THE MERITS OR IRREPARABLE HARM. HOWEVER, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT TO ARRANGE AN ON-SITE INSPECTION BY PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL OF DOCUMENTS SPECIFICALLY IDENTIFIED IN THE MANAGEMENT AGREEMENT, THE OPERATIONS AGREEMENT AND CALIFORNIA CORP. CODE 17058 AND 17106 AS SUBJECT TO INSPECTION. THE INSPECTION SHALL BE CONDUCTED IN A SINGLE DAY AND AT THE PARTIES' EARLIEST MUTUAL CONVENIENCE. ORDER WITH AN AGREED UPON MODIFICATION AS TO THE INSPECTION SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: ARLENE HOWELL, CSR #2542
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-15-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TOBI.COM, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Off calendar. A dismissal of the entire action was filed March 6, 2012. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Joshua D. Cohn of Wendel Rosen Black & Dean LLP, (510-834-6600)appearing for plaintiff.
Atty. Adam R. Bernstein of Adam R. Bernstein, (408-628-4493) appearing for defendant.

Argued - DEFENDANT TOBI.COM, LLC's Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Ntc; To Compel Further Answers To Form Interrogatories; To Compel Further Answers To Specially Prepared Interrogatories; To Compel Further Answers To Requests For Admission; To Compel Further Responses To Inspection Demands; To Compel Compliance With Inspection Demands; And For Monetary Sanctions is granted and sanctions awarded in the amount of $4,000.00 to be paid on or before March 5, 2012. Order signed in open court. Parties stipulated have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Set For Trial On Jun-18-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Dec-02-2011 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-15-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
Appearances: Joshua D. Cohen of Morgan Miller Blair (925.979.3337) for plaintiff and moving party; Adam R. Bernstein (408.628.4493) for defendant and responding party.
This matter was not argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's order to show cause re: preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiff has failed to show a likelihood of success on the merits or irreparable harm. However, the court orders defendant to arrange an on-site inspection by plaintiff and his counsel of documents specifically identified in the Management Agreement, the Operations Agreement and California Corp. Code 17058 and 17106 as subject to inspection. The inspection shall be conducted in a single day and at the parties' earliest mutual convenience. Order with an agreed upon modification as to the inspection signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542
